02 Come and Train Men & women welcome

You don't need to be fit.
You need to be there.

What to bring
01

Footy boots or runners

We've got a few spares if you're stuck.

02

A water bottle

It gets warm out there. Hydrate hard.

03

An ice pack for tomorrow

Trust us. Your hamstrings will be in touch.

Find us
Wednesday
5:00 – 6:00 PM
Watson's Oval #2, Manunda
91–97 Macnamara St, Manunda QLD 4870

Training can change location at times — check our socials before turning up.

Get directions → Find us on Facebook →
03About the club

More Than
a Team

The Stingers are AFL Masters in Cairns — over-35s footy. We take the game and each other seriously. Not ourselves. Saturdays we pull on the jumper for the same reason: locals who'd never cross paths walk off as mates.

View the squad →
Stinger life
Photo TBD
01

Wednesday Training

Watson's Oval, 5pm sharp. Run, drill, chat, repeat.

The Contest

Hard ball at the stoppage.
Old legs, sharper minds.

Mateship

Twenty-two on the field. One squad
either side of the boundary.

Travel the Coast

A few times a season we hit the road — carnivals, away games, weekends away.

04The moment Watson's Oval #2 Wed 5pm
05 05Join the Stingers

Ready to pull on
the jumper?

Registrations open · 2026 Season

Whether you've played 200 games or never kicked a footy, there's a place for you at this club. Men and women, new starters, returning veterans — every skill level welcome.

Register on PlayHQ →

Or just turn up Wednesday — training's open, no commitment until you're ready.

For business

Back the Stingers. Keep community footy alive in FNQ.

Sponsorship keeps the lights on, the boots laced, and the club running. Your business gets a home on every jumper, every game day, every season.

Become a sponsor →
